
--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"findEmployees":[{"details":{"forename":"Jens"}},{"details":{"forename":"Dustin"}},{"details":{"forename":"Stefan"}},{"details":{"forename":"Björn"}},{"details":{"forename":"Sergiy"}},{"details":{"forename":"Suvij"}},{"details":{"forename":"Nithin"}},{"details":{"forename":"Eelco"}},{"details":{"forename":"Alexandra"}},{"details":{"forename":"David"}}]},"path":[]}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql
--graphql--
